Original iPhone Tower Defense

Sprout Fortress

Grow a magical fortress garden, place original flower defenders, collect energy, and hold the line against playful fantasy invaders in an offline strategy game.

Screenshots

Main Menu

Enter a bright original fortress garden built for quick mobile sessions.

Level Progress

Pick stages, advance through waves, and grow your defensive plan.

Strategic Defense

Place Bloom, Bolt, Frost, and Bastion defenders to stop approaching invaders.

Victory Moments

Clear waves, protect the path, and prepare for the next challenge.

Features

Four Defender Roles

Use Bloom for energy, Bolt for damage, Frost for slowing pressure, and Bastion for durable blocking.

Wave-Based Strategy

Read each lane, spend energy wisely, and adapt as waves become more demanding.

Offline Play

No login, ads, analytics, or network connection is required for normal gameplay.

Mobile-First Controls

Simple tap placement and readable portrait layouts make short sessions easy to enjoy.

Original Fantasy Theme

A fresh fortress-garden setting with crystal energy, runic guardians, and whimsical invaders.

Progressive Levels

Advance through handcrafted stages that introduce stronger timing and resource decisions.

About

Sprout Fortress is a single-player fantasy tower defense game for iPhone. Build a compact defense using magical flower guardians and keep the fortress path safe across escalating waves.

The game is designed around quick decisions, clear roles, and an original visual identity suitable for all ages.

Support

If you need help with gameplay, installation, or app behavior, please contact the developer through the App Store product page after release.

  • Restart the app if a level does not respond.
  • Progress is stored locally on your device.
  • No account or internet connection is required for normal play.

App Information

Genre: Tower Defense / Strategy
Compatibility: iPhone, iOS 13.0 or later
Age Rating: 4+
Version: 1.0.0 (1)
Language: English
Privacy: No personal data collection
